channel.title: Love on Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Love on Blog

item.title: l.o.v.e
item.description:
$ cd lovetarget

$ ls

othergirl

$ ls -a

.you othergirl

$ sudo vi ./my_heart

[sudo] password :

CENSORED

$ chmod +x my_heart

$ sudo chown -R .you ./my_heart

[sudo] password :

please wait…

an error occured : failed to touch .you.

$ sudo chown -R .you ./my_heart

please wait…

an error occured : failed to touch .you.

$ sudo chown -R .you ./my_heart

please wait…

an error occured : failed to touch .you.
